brand.tagline: Payment infrastructure for businesses that move fast.

game.startHint: Click to enter the driving experience

controls.title: Controls
controls.hintDesktop: Use WASD or arrow keys. Space to brake, Shift to boost.
controls.hintMobile: Use the on-screen buttons to drive.

game.fallback: Your browser does not support WebGL, so the 3D world cannot be shown. You can still explore all the content below.
game.prefersReducedMotion: Reduced-motion mode is on — the 3D world is disabled for your comfort.

hero.title: Money that moves as fast as your ideas
hero.subtitle: OrbitPay unifies payments, payouts, and insights in one platform that is fast, secure, and built to scale globally.
hero.note: Click the 3D world or press WASD to start driving and explore the features.

sectionsIntro.title: Everything you need to accept and send money
sectionsIntro.subtitle: Every module is built to work on its own — and better together.

how.title: Live in three steps
how.step1Body: Go live via SDK or no-code in minutes, with documentation that stays out of your way.
how.step2Body: Support cards, e-wallets, and local bank transfers across many countries.
how.step3Body: Monitor, reconcile, and optimize with real-time dashboards and APIs.

cta.title: Ready to accelerate your growth?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses that rely on OrbitPay.

payments.title: Payments
payments.tagline: Accept payments wherever your customers are
payments.body: One integration for cards, e-wallets, QR, and bank transfers. A fast, seamless checkout that lifts conversion.

payouts.title: Payouts
payouts.body: Pay vendors, partners, and staff in bulk with fast settlement and full status tracking.

global.title: Global
global.body: Accept in local currencies and settle in your currency of choice, with compliance built in.

security.title: Security
security.body: End-to-end encryption, AI-driven fraud detection, and tokenization keep every transaction safe.

insights.title: Insights
insights.body: Live dashboards, automated reconciliation, and exportable reports give you the full picture.

meta.title: About Us
meta.description: The story, mission, and values behind OrbitPay.

hero.title: We build the financial rails for the internet
hero.subtitle: Our mission is to make cross-border payments as simple as sending a message.

story.title: Our story
story.body1: OrbitPay was born from one belief: any business, anywhere, deserves world-class payment infrastructure without the complexity.
story.body2: Since 2024 we have distilled the complexity of payments into clean APIs and delightful experiences for developers and customers alike.

values.title: The values we hold
values.reliabilityBody: Money should never wait. We engineer for reliability without compromise.
values.transparencyBody: Clear pricing, no hidden fees. You always know what is happening.
values.securityBody: Trust is earned. Security is embedded in every decision we make.
values.craftBody: Details matter. We treat every pixel and every millisecond seriously.

meta.title: Compliance & Security
meta.description: OrbitPay's compliance standards, certifications, and security practices.

hero.title: Built on compliance, guarded by security
hero.subtitle: We align our operations with globally recognized standards to keep your funds and data safe.

intro.title: Our commitment
intro.body: Compliance is not a checkbox — it is a foundation. Here are the frameworks and certifications we align to.

pcidss.title: PCI DSS Level 1
pcidss.desc: The highest tier of the payment card industry data security standard to protect cardholder data.

iso27001.title: ISO/IEC 27001
iso27001.desc: An information security management system for structured risk management.

gdpr.title: GDPR & PDPA
gdpr.desc: Privacy practices aligned with European and Southeast Asian data-protection regulations.

aml.title: AML / KYC
aml.desc: Anti-money-laundering and identity-verification programs to prevent misuse.

soc2.title: SOC 2 Type II
soc2.desc: Independently audited controls over security, availability, and confidentiality.

uptime.title: 99.99% SLA
uptime.desc: A service availability commitment backed by continuous monitoring and redundancy.

disclaimer.title: Important note
disclaimer.body: This page is provided for informational purposes. The certification names shown are examples for a product demo and are not statements of actual certification. Replace them with your real compliance status before publishing.

meta.title: Contact Us
meta.description: Talk to the OrbitPay team about payments, payouts, and integrations.

hero.title: Let's talk about your growth
hero.subtitle: Fill in the form and our team will get back to you within one business day.

errors.messageShort: Message must be at least 10 characters.

success.title: Message sent!
success.body: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will reply shortly.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: How OrbitPay collects, uses, and protects your data.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it. (Sample text — replace with your official policy.)
privacy.s1Body: We collect data you provide directly, transaction data, and technical data such as IP address and browser type.
privacy.s2Body: Data is used to provide the service, prevent fraud, meet legal obligations, and improve our products.
privacy.s3Body: We do not sell your personal data. It is shared only with trusted service providers as operationally required.
privacy.s4Body: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data in line with applicable regulations.
privacy.s5Body: For privacy questions, reach us via the contact page.

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: The terms that govern the use of OrbitPay's services.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using our services you agree to the following terms. (Sample text — replace with your official terms.)
terms.s1Body: You agree to use the service lawfully and not to misuse it in any way.
terms.s2Body: You are responsible for keeping your account credentials confidential and for all activity within it.
terms.s3Body: Service fees are described in your agreement. Changes will be communicated in advance.
terms.s4Body: The service is provided as is. Our liability is limited to the extent permitted by law.
terms.s5Body: We may update these terms from time to time and will note the update date.

footer.tagline: Payment infrastructure for the next era.
footer.disclaimer: OrbitPay is a placeholder brand for demonstration and is not a real financial institution.

notFound.title: This page drifted off orbit
notFound.subtitle: The page you are looking for could not be found.
